name: MTT Cell Viability Assay

components.name: 1. Seed cells in 96-well plate (5,000–10,000 cells/well, 100 µL)

note.en: Add PBS to all outer-edge wells (replace medium) to prevent evaporation. Triplicate wells per condition. Allow cells to attach overnight at 37°C, 5% CO₂.
note.zh: 96 孔板边缘孔加 PBS（替代培养基）防蒸发。每组处理设三复孔。37°C 5% CO₂ 过夜贴壁。

note.en: Dilute drugs in complete medium. Include: (a) untreated control, (b) blank (medium only, no cells), (c) solvent control (DMSO ≤0.1%). Volume per well: 100 µL. Refresh medium at 48 h if treatment >48 h.
note.zh: 药物用完全培养基稀释。设置：(a) 未处理对照；(b) 空白（仅培养基，无细胞）；(c) 溶剂对照（DMSO ≤0.1%）。每孔 100 µL。处理超过 48 h 时在 48 h 换液。

components.name: 3. Prepare MTT stock: 5 mg/mL in PBS; filter-sterilize (0.22 µm); protect from light

note.en: Store at 4°C (≤4 weeks) or −20°C (months). MTT is light-sensitive (keep foil-covered). Warm to 37°C before use. Do NOT use if solution is purple (pre-reduced).
note.zh: 4°C 保存（≤4 周）或 −20°C（数月）。MTT 避光（锡纸包裹）。使用前温热至 37°C。如溶液已变紫色（预还原）则弃用。

components.name: 4. Add 10 µL MTT stock (5 mg/mL) to each well; final 0.5 mg/mL

note.en: Use multi-channel pipette. Add directly to medium — do NOT remove medium first. Mix gently by pipetting once.
note.zh: 用多道移液器加入。直接加入培养基中——不要先去除培养基。轻柔吸打一次混匀。

components.name: 5. Incubate 2–4 h at 37°C, 5% CO₂ (monitor purple crystal formation)

note.en: Stop when crystals visible under microscope but medium still orange (2–4 h typical). Over-incubation: crystals dissolve back, false low readings. Under-incubation: insufficient signal.
note.zh: 显微镜可见紫色结晶且培养基仍呈橙色时终止（通常 2–4 h）。过度孵育：结晶重溶，读数假低。孵育不足：信号不够。

components.name: 6. Remove ALL medium carefully by aspiration (do not disturb crystals)

note.en: Tilt plate, aspirate from corner of well. Residual phenol-red medium interferes with absorbance. Blot plate on paper towel gently.
note.zh: 倾斜培养板，从孔角吸液。残余酚红培养基会干扰吸光度。将板轻扣在纸巾上吸干。

components.name: 7. Add 100–150 µL DMSO per well; shake 10 min RT to dissolve crystals

note.en: Orbital shaker 150–200 rpm. Crystals should fully dissolve (solution homogeneous purple). If crystals persist: warm plate to 37°C briefly.
note.zh: 150–200 rpm 振荡器。结晶应完全溶解（溶液均匀紫色）。结晶未溶：短暂温热至 37°C。

components.name: 8. Read absorbance at 570 nm (reference: 630–650 nm) within 30 min

note.en: OD must be read within 30 min (DMSO-formazan degrades). Reference wavelength corrects for plate/background. % Viability = (OD_treated − OD_blank) / (OD_control − OD_blank) × 100.
note.zh: 30 min 内读数（DMSO-甲臜降解）。参考波长校正背景。% 活力 = (OD处理 − OD空白) / (OD对照 − OD空白) × 100。

notes.en: MTT is endpoint assay — cells are killed by DMSO. For non-destructive repeated measurement use CCK-8 (cck8_proliferation) or resazurin_assay. MTT can give false positives with: strong reducing agents (NAC, ascorbic acid, β-ME), high serum, some antioxidants. Verify cytotoxicity with morphology (phase contrast) or trypan blue.
notes.zh: MTT 是终点法——DMSO 杀死细胞。需重复测量同一孔用 CCK-8（cck8_proliferation）或 resazurin_assay。假阳性干扰物：强还原剂（NAC、维生素 C、β-ME）、高血清、抗氧化剂。结合形态学（相差显微镜）或台盼蓝验证细胞毒性。

ref: Mosmann (1983) J Immunol Methods 65:55–63; van Meerloo et al. (2011) Methods Mol Biol 731:237–245; Stockert et al. (2012) Acta Histochem 114:785–796

note.en: Cells attach overnight at 37°C before adding treatment
note.zh: 细胞 37°C 过夜贴壁后再加药处理

note.en: Treatment incubation (24–72 h) is a natural overnight stopping point
note.zh: 药物处理孵育（24–72 h）为自然过夜停顿点

usage.en: Measure cell viability and proliferation using MTT colorimetric assay.
usage.zh: MTT 比色法检测细胞活力和增殖。
